mapper.update: update t_pay_order set refund_times = refund_times + 1, refund_state = CASE WHEN refund_amount + #{currentRefundAmount} >= amount THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, `state` = CASE WHEN refund_state = 2 THEN 5 ELSE 2 END, refund_amount = refund_amount + #{currentRefundAmount} where pay_order_id = #{payOrderId} and `state` = 2 and refund_amount + #{currentRefundAmount} <= amount and refund_state in (0, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT t.mch_no AS mchNo, MAX(t.mch_name) AS mchName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount - IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0) - IFNULL(t.refund_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS creditedAmount, COUNT(1) AS rechargeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_pay_order t WHERE 1=1 AND t.mch_no = #{param.mchNo} AND t.mch_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.mchName}, '%') AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.mch_no ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.channel_id AS channelId, c.if_code AS ifCode, c.channel_name AS channelName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, COUNT(1) AS rechargeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_pay_order t LEFT JOIN t_pay_channel c ON c.id = t.channel_id WHERE 1=1 AND t.mch_no = #{param.mchNo} AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.channel_id, c.if_code, c.channel_name ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.product_id AS productId, MAX(t.channel_name) AS channelName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rechargeCount, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS blueCount FROM t_pay_order t WHERE 1=1 AND t.product_id = #{param.productId} AND t.channel_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.channelName}, '%') AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.product_id ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.mch_no AS mchNo, MAX(t.mch_name) AS mchName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount - IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0) - IFNULL(t.refund_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS creditedAmount, COUNT(1) AS rechargeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_pay_order t WHERE 1=1 AND t.product_id = #{param.productId} AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.mch_no ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.if_code AS ifCode, d.if_name AS ifName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount - IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0) - IFNULL(t.refund_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS creditedAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount * IFNULL(t.channel_fee_rate,0) / 100),0)/100, 2) AS channelFeeAmount, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS platformIncome, 0 AS agentIncome, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rechargeCount, COUNT(1) AS totalCount FROM t_pay_order t LEFT JOIN t_pay_interface_define d ON d.if_code = t.if_code WHERE 1=1 AND t.if_code = #{param.ifCode} AND d.if_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.ifName}, '%') AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.if_code, d.if_name ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.channel_id AS channelId, c.channel_name AS channelName, c.if_code AS ifCode, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS rechargeAmount, COUNT(1) AS rechargeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN t.state = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM t_pay_order t LEFT JOIN t_pay_channel c ON c.id = t.channel_id WHERE 1=1 AND t.if_code = #{param.ifCode} AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.channel_id, c.channel_name, c.if_code ORDER BY rechargeAmount DESC

SELECT t.channel_id AS channelId, c.channel_name AS channelName, c.if_code AS ifCode, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS throughputAmount, MAX(c.channel_rate) AS feeRate, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount - IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0) - IFNULL(t.refund_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS creditAmount FROM t_pay_order t LEFT JOIN t_pay_channel c ON c.id = t.channel_id WHERE 1=1 AND t.if_code = #{param.ifCode} AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.channel_id, c.channel_name, c.if_code ORDER BY throughputAmount DESC

SELECT t.product_id AS productId, MAX(t.channel_name) AS productName, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount),0)/100, 2) AS throughputAmount, MAX(t.mch_fee_rate) AS feeRate, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(t.amount - IFNULL(t.mch_fee_amount,0) - IFNULL(t.refund_amount,0)),0)/100, 2) AS creditAmount FROM t_pay_order t WHERE 1=1 AND t.mch_no = #{param.mchNo} AND t.created_at >= #{param.createTimeStart} AND t.created_at <= #{param.createTimeEnd} GROUP BY t.product_id ORDER BY throughputAmount DESC
